name: Balsamic Caesar Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the olive oil, plain nonfat yogurt, balsamic vinegar, and garlic.
2. Add the grated Parmesan cheese to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Whisk the dressing until it is smooth and evenly mixed.
4. Store in an airtight container for up to 5 days.
Makes 4 servings.
